core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain accurate statistical and consensus demand forecast

Even the analytical skills are of limited relevance given the domain-specific technical requirements
summary: Match score is 5.0 (poor_match). This is a specialist supply chain demand planning role requiring deep expertise in statistical forecasting, S&OP processes, and planning systems (Kinaxis/SAP). The candidate has no supply chain background, no planning system experience, and no manufacturing context. The only partial overlap is general analytical skills. This role is fundamentally misaligned with the candidate's profile and should not be pursued.
